mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_skill WHERE code = #{code} AND id != #{excludeId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_skill WHERE category_id = #{categoryId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_skill (category_id, name, code, icon, description, prompt_template, temperature, max_tokens, input_schema, output_format, module_key, status, sort_order, use_count, created_by, created_at) VALUES (#{categoryId}, #{name}, #{code}, #{icon}, #{description}, #{promptTemplate}, #{temperature}, #{maxTokens}, #{inputSchema}, #{outputFormat}, #{moduleKey}, #{status}, #{sortOrder}, 0, #{createdBy}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_skill SET use_count = use_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
